name: Sourdough Pancakes#5
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the eggs.
2. Add milk and starter to the beaten eggs.
3. Sift together flour, baking soda, baking powder, salt, and sugar.
4. Mix the sifted ingredients into the egg mixture.
5. Drop batter onto a hot griddle using large spoonfuls.
- If the griddle is not greased, add 1/4 cup melted fat to the recipe.
- Using bacon fat will enhance the flavor of the pancakes.
